note: seq=38 SEV-1 PG RECOVERY: restart PG + real psycopg2 readiness loop (won't proceed until PG answers) + PG-safe pool (20 procs x16 threads=320 lanes,20 conns) + staggered restart. Never finalizes on a dead DB.

steps.note: seq=38 PG RECOVERY (SEV-1): restart Postgres, WAIT for real readiness (psycopg2 SELECT 1, up to 150s), install a PG-SAFE pool template (16 threads), reduce to 20 procs, STAGGER restart, confirm PG still up. Will not pass (and the puller will not finalize) until PG actually answers.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS enrichment pool worker (instance %i; PG-SAFE recovery config)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=ATLAS_WORKER_INSTANCE=%i
Environment=ATLAS_POOL_CONCURRENCY=16
Environment=ATLAS_POOL_CLAIM=32
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_AUTOPULL_CONF=/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/enrich/atlas_enrich_pool.py --loop
Restart=always
RestartSec=10
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

steps.cmd: systemctl reset-failed atlas-enrich-pool@1.service atlas-enrich-pool@2.service atlas-enrich-pool@3.service atlas-enrich-pool@4.service atlas-enrich-pool@5.service atlas-enrich-pool@6.service atlas-enrich-pool@7.service atlas-enrich-pool@8.service atlas-enrich-pool@9.service atlas-enrich-pool@10.service atlas-enrich-pool@11.service atlas-enrich-pool@12.service atlas-enrich-pool@13.service atlas-enrich-pool@14.service atlas-enrich-pool@15.service atlas-enrich-pool@16.service atlas-enrich-pool@17.service atlas-enrich-pool@18.service atlas-enrich-pool@19.service atlas-enrich-pool@20.service atlas-enrich-pool@21.service atlas-enrich-pool@22.service atlas-enrich-pool@23.service atlas-enrich-pool@24.service atlas-enrich-pool@25.service atlas-enrich-pool@26.service atlas-enrich-pool@27.service atlas-enrich-pool@28.service atlas-enrich-pool@29.service atlas-enrich-pool@30.service atlas-enrich-pool@31.service atlas-enrich-pool@32.service atlas-enrich-worker@1.service atlas-enrich-worker@2.service atlas-enrich-worker@3.service atlas-enrich-worker@4.service atlas-enrich-worker@5.service atlas-enrich-worker@6.service atlas-enrich-worker@7.service atlas-enrich-worker@8.service atlas-enrich-worker@9.service atlas-enrich-worker@10.service atlas-enrich-worker@11.service atlas-enrich-worker@12.service atlas-enrich-worker@13.service atlas-enrich-worker@14.service atlas-enrich-worker@15.service atlas-enrich-worker@16.service atlas-enrich-worker@17.service atlas-enrich-worker@18.service atlas-enrich-worker@19.service atlas-enrich-worker@20.service atlas-enrich-worker@21.service atlas-enrich-worker@22.service atlas-enrich-worker@23.service atlas-enrich-worker@24.service
